entry.title: Bill 98 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-50, AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 6 OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO TRANSIENT ACCOMMODATIONS

Delays the effective date of Ordinance No. 25-50, relating to transient accommodations, until July 1, 2026.

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 98 passes second & final reading - 12/03/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 98 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-12-03
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-50, AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 6 OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO TRANSIENT ACCOMMODATIONS

Delays the effective date of Ordinance No. 25-50, relating to transient accommodations, until July 1, 2026.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-12-03
